canonicalReview.notes: Full canonical corpus matched title, summary, symptoms, aliases, devices, platforms, error messages, officialTerms and communityTerms. Existing Wi-Fi, cellular-data, Find My and touch-screen articles are adjacent but do not cover the system/App location permission and precise-location diagnostic intent.
